title: nassella ramosa
intro: Nassella ramosa, also known as Needle-and-Thread, is a perennial grass native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and as an anti-inflammatory agent. The health benefits of Nassella ramosa include its ability to soothe digestive problems, reduce inflammation, and even exhibit antifungal properties. Nassella ramosa can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being.
